Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jessica L. Chylik, Esq., Telephone (415) 938-6552, Former counsel for Plaintiff Stephen Elliott;
LIku T. Madoshi, Esq., Bledsoe, et al, Telephone: (415) 981-5411, appearing for Defendants Zachary Shaffer, et al;

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants Shang Chiang, Helen Fang's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Responses And Request For Fees Costs And Monetary Sanctions

Motion is Granted. Plaintiff shall serve code compliant verified responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests for Admissions, and Requests for Production of Documents within 10 court days of entry of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $2,500. Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jessica L. Chylik (415-938-6552) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Stephen P. Elliott.
Davis Reilly (415-981-5411) for Defendant/Moving party SHANG CHIANG and HELEN FANG.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Plaintiff requests more time to file. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs SHANG CHIANG and HELEN FANG's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained. Demurer is sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action for retaliation and unlawful actions by landlord; non-opposition filed. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action for breach of contract, breach of covenant of quiet enjoyment and wrongful eviction for Plaintiff to properly allege a contract between Plaintiff and moving Defendants. Amended complaint to be filed by 12/15/17. Order signed in open court. Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
